subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #027 The Trinity
subcodes.first_line: The reality of the Divinity is sanctified and exalted beyond the comprehension of all created things
subcodes.first_line_orig: حقیقت الوهیت که منزه و مقدس از ادراک کائناتست و ابداً بتصور اهل عقول
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as mirror, @essential vs. actional attributes of God, @identity; relationship of Manifestation of God to God, @The Holy Spirit, @transcendence; unknowability of God
